title: Bitcoin Weigh-In Daily Commodity Price Dataset
description: Daily commodity prices denominated in Bitcoin, 2013-present. Raw USD closes for BTC, gold, silver, platinum, copper, Brent crude, wheat, and coffee, plus derived per-BTC values and a deterministically computed BTC circulating supply.

columns.name: date
columns.notes: Trading day. Every calendar date from coverage start to last update has a row.

columns.name: btc_usd
columns.notes: Continuous BTC-USD spot aggregate. Required field; rows without a btc_usd value are not emitted.

columns.name: btc_supply
columns.notes: Deterministic function of days-since-genesis (2009-01-03) at 144 blocks/day target, halving every 210,000 blocks. No API dependency.

columns.name: brent_usd
columns.notes: Europe Brent spot FOB, sourced from EIA via FRED. Typically lags one business day.

columns.name: xau_per_btc
columns.unit: troy ounces of gold per BTC
columns.notes: How many troy ounces of gold 1 BTC could purchase at the day's close.

columns.name: xag_per_btc
columns.unit: troy ounces of silver per BTC
columns.notes: How many troy ounces of silver 1 BTC could purchase at the day's close.

columns.name: xpt_per_btc
columns.unit: troy ounces of platinum per BTC
columns.notes: How many troy ounces of platinum 1 BTC could purchase at the day's close.

columns.name: copper_per_btc
columns.notes: How many pounds of copper 1 BTC could purchase at the day's close.

columns.name: brent_per_btc
columns.unit: barrels of Brent crude per BTC
columns.notes: How many barrels of Brent crude 1 BTC could purchase at the day's close.

columns.name: wheat_per_btc
columns.notes: How many bushels of CBOT wheat 1 BTC could purchase at the day's close.

columns.name: coffee_per_btc
columns.unit: pounds of Arabica coffee per BTC (cents-per-pound denominator)
columns.notes: Coffee is quoted in cents; the ratio reflects that denominator. Divide by 100 if you want pounds per BTC at dollar parity.

columns.name: forward_filled
columns.notes: Empty string when no fields were forward-filled, or a pipe-delimited list of field names (e.g. "xpt_usd|brent_usd") when some were. Per-row tracking begins 2026-05-17; historical rows carry an empty string regardless of their true fill state.
